response:
phase one needs ten man hours
phase two needs twenty man hours
phase three needs forty man hours
phase four needs eighty man hours
phase five needs one hundred sixty man hours
sum of all phases equals three hundred ten
initial plan set total time to twenty weeks
each phase now takes one point five times longer
new duration is thirty weeks for full project
this math holds true for every single phase
no change occurs in order of work steps
planning must adapt to new time needs
resources will stretch to meet new goals
fortune brings success to this hard work
the team stays focused on final result
